{{< include /_macros.qmd >}}

# Outlook {#sec-outlook}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## In this chapter
<!-- Where pretraining is heading, and the seam to everything this book
     deliberately left out. -->
:::

## What we built

<!-- One-page recap of the arc: problem -> representation -> architecture ->
     training -> alternatives. -->

## Open problems

<!-- Long context, efficiency, data limits, the recurrence-vs-attention
     question. Honest uncertainties. -->

## Beyond pretraining

<!-- The bridge to a possible follow-up: post-training, alignment, the "real
     stuff." Explicitly out of scope here. -->

## Further reading {.unnumbered}
